content.rendered:
[vc_section][vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space height=”60px”][vc_column_text]

Intellectual Property

Exoxemis offers a comprehensive intellectual property portfolio in myeloperoxidase (MPO) and eosinophil peroxidase (EPO) technologies. Protected by more than 20 patents worldwide, this portfolio covers research and development, manufacturing, formulation, and delivery.

  • Haloperoxidase Acid Optimum Chemiluminescence Assay System
  • Oxygen Activatable Formulations for Disinfection or Sterilization
  • Treatment of Infection and the Control of Flora Using Haloperoxidase
  • Killing or Inhibition of Yeast and Sporular Microorganisms
  • The Prevention and Treatment of STDs
  • Chemiluminescence Assay of In Vivo Inflammation
  • Other Methods and Compositions Patents

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_id=”table6″][vc_column][vc_empty_space height=”60px”]

Chemiluminescence Assay of In Vivo Inflammation

Patent Title Country Patent Number
Chemiluminescence Assay of In Vivo Inflammation U.S.A 5,108,899
EPC 0430440

@graph.name: Intellectual - Exoxemis - a biomedical research company focused on the study and commercialization of a topical biological antiseptic system utilizing Myeloperoxidase (MPO).
Exoxemis - a biomedical research company focused on the study and commercialization of a topical biological antiseptic system utilizing Myeloperoxidase (MPO).
@graph.description: Myeloperoxidase (MPO) and eosinophil peroxidase (EPO) enzymes work to preferentially kill a broad range of pathogens through a unique mechanism of action unlikely to induce resistance.
